_comment: Custom XML mapping ready for POST /api/v1/tenant/import-mappings. Handles a PitStop-lite export shape that ships with Acme Preflight 2.1.
name: Acme PitStop-lite
description: Proprietary XML export from Acme Preflight 2.1 (the OEM rebranded older PitStop engine).
sample_payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<PreflightLog>
  <Issues>
    <Issue id="acme.img.lowres" level="HIGH" page="2">
      <Description>Image resolution 144 dpi is below the 300 dpi threshold</Description>
      <Location><Box>72 72 216 216</Box></Location>
      <Target type="image" name="Im42"/>
      <Category>images</Category>
    </Issue>
    <Issue id="acme.font.noembed" level="MEDIUM" page="1">
      <Description>Font Helvetica-Bold is not embedded</Description>
      <Target type="font" name="Helvetica-Bold"/>
      <Category>fonts</Category>
    </Issue>
    <Issue id="acme.color.rgb_in_cmyk" level="MEDIUM" page="3">
      <Description>RGB color object used in a CMYK-intent job</Description>
      <Location><Box>144,300,468,360</Box></Location>
      <Category>color</Category>
      <Standard ref="PDF/X-4:2010 6.2.2"/>
    </Issue>
  </Issues>
</PreflightLog>
